changeLog:
### Merged PRs since stable release (2026-03-01)

- 2026-03-29 — [#7153](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7153) Add Agents to develop
- 2026-03-27 — [#7133](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7133) Fix broken relative local include paths
- 2026-03-27 — [#7134](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7134) rmg: break quest zone ownership cycle
- 2026-03-26 — [#7143](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7143) Bump DavidAnson/markdownlint-cli2-action from 22 to 23
- 2026-03-26 — [#7137](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7137) [MMAI] Siege-only models
- 2026-03-23 — [#7131](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7131) mapeditor: fix random artifact inspect crash
- 2026-03-22 — [#7129](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7129) Add DLL_LINKAGE and out-of-line destructors to all exception classes
- 2026-03-22 — [#7100](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7100) mapeditor: fix template editor selection crash
- 2026-03-22 — [#7120](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7120) editor: fix "Export As" extension handling and "Save As" writes
- 2026-03-22 — [#7122](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7122) editor: reject zero custom RMG seed
- 2026-03-22 — [#7125](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7125) Fix std::terminate crash in Nullkiller2 AI on macOS when game ends during AI turn
- 2026-03-19 — [#7084](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7084) editor: prevent line tool assert after level switches
- 2026-03-18 — [#7085](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7085) mapeditor: handle nodiscard in CardItem ctor
- 2026-03-18 — [#7101](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7101) VCMIDirs: fix vcmieditor dev-mode data lookup
- 2026-03-15 — [#7063](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7063) Update supported formats in File_Formats.md
- 2026-03-15 — [#7086](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7086) cmake-presets: use PATH tools for Linux presets
- 2026-03-13 — [#7039](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7039) [1.8] Remove NKAI 1 and fuzzylite from engine
- 2026-03-10 — [#6687](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/6687) [MMAI] Refactor
- 2026-03-10 — [#7051](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7051) rmg: add AGENTS.md
- 2026-03-10 — [#7053](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7053) editor: fix crash on new map with missing scope
- 2026-03-07 — [#7054](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7054) Fix GCC15 uninitialized warning in ForEachVisitor
- 2026-03-05 — [#6995](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/6995) Bump actions/upload-artifact from 6 to 7
- 2026-03-05 — [#6996](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/6996) Bump actions/download-artifact from 7 to 8
- 2026-03-05 — [#7042](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7042) Translations update from Hosted Weblate
- 2026-03-05 — [#7041](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7041) Fix json formatting in translations
- 2026-03-05 — [#7040](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7040) [1.7] Integration of translations via Weblate
- 2026-03-05 — [#6992](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/6992) Update polish.json
- 2026-03-03 — [#7019](https://github.com/vcmi/vcmi/pull/7019) fix crash when victor is not valid player
